chat_template: {% if messages[0]['role'] == 'system' %}{% set loop_messages = messages[1:] %}{% set system_message = messages[0]['content'] %}{% elif false == true and not system_message %}{% set loop_messages = messages %}{% else %}{% set loop_messages = messages %}{% endif %}{% for message in loop_messages %}{% if loop.index0 == 0 %}{% if system_message %}{{ system_message }}{% endif %}{% endif %}{% if message['role'] == 'user' %}{{ '[INST] ' + message['content'] + ' [/INST]' }}{% elif message['role'] == 'assistant' %}{{ message['content'] + eos_token }}{% endif %}{% endfor %}
